title: Agent Harness Project Configuration
description: Machine-readable project configuration to accelerate profile resolution. AGENTS.md remains the human source of truth.

languages.description: Declared languages for this project. Values must match profile filenames in profiles/languages/.

frameworks.description: Declared frameworks or runtimes. Values must match profile filenames in profiles/frameworks/.

projectTypes.description: Declared project types. Values must match profile filenames in profiles/project-types/.

repositoryProfiles.description: Declared repository-kind profiles. Values must match profile filenames in profiles/repository-kinds/.

evidenceModel.description: Evidence model version. V2 uses human dashboard + machine evidence separation.

securityRequired.description: Whether security governance is mandatory for this project.

operationsRequired.description: Whether operations governance is mandatory for this project.
